description: NTP-Deepen 30min cron tick log. Trim to last 200 entries.

ticks.note: Deepened causality topic from stub to full page (Pearl hierarchy, 6 papers, mech candidate C-CAUSAL-1, cross-links).
Deepened grounding topic from stub to full page (Harnad→Bender→Mollo&Millière chronology, 7 papers, C-GROUND-1/2 mech candidates, cross-links to embodiment/causality/world_model).

Deepened world_model topic from stub to full page (3-way disambiguation, 10-paper chronology Ha2018→Wang2025, C-WM-1 closed-world bottleneck & C-WM-2 open-world dilution mech candidates, video-NTP & reasoning-trace counterexamples, cross-links).

Deepened embodiment topic from stub to full page (Brooks1991→π₀/GR00T2025 chronology, 11 papers incl. DAgger/RT-1/RT-2/PaLM-E/OpenVLA/Open-X-Embodiment, C-EMBOD-1 compounding-error-floor & C-EMBOD-2 morphology-gap mech candidates, cross-links to grounding/causality/world_model/online_learning).

Deepened online_learning topic from stub to full page (McCloskey1989 to Ibrahim2024 chronology, 16 papers incl. EWC/MEMIT/MemGPT/TTT-Linear/continual-backprop, C-CONT-1 cutoff-bottleneck and C-CONT-2 plasticity-stability mech candidates, cross-links to world_model/embodiment/causality/N1).

Deepened reasoning topic: 2022-01 Wei CoT → 2026-05 Anti-Collapse chronology (9 papers incl. Turpin/Lanham/Dziri/Reversal-Curse/R1/Anthropic-biology/Garcia), C-REAS-1/2/3 mech candidates with falsification conditions, 3 counter-examples (attribution-graph/R1-on-AIME/low-prec-CoT-Turing), 2026-05-27 judgment that empirical CoT-mech evidence shrank while theoretical (TC⁰ + Ω(H)) hardened, cross-links to formal_limits/causality/scaling_limits/N1.

Deepened scaling_limits topic from stub to full page (Kaplan2020→Chinchilla→Emergence/Mirage→Sorscher→Overtraining→Precision→Joint-KL/Shannon/Confab chronology with 10 papers, C-SCALE-1/2/3 cap candidates with falsification conditions, 3 counter-examples incl. data-pruning & summarized-CoT, 2026-05-27 judgment that scaling 上界 expanded from (N,D,C) to multi-axis manifold, cross-links to formal_limits/reasoning/world_model/online_learning/N1).

Started N2 sample chapter (TC⁰ wall): opening §1 (~900 substantive 字) anchored on Furst-Saxe-Sipser 1984 → Hahn 2019 → Merrill-Sabharwal 2021/2022/2023 chronology with 5 real arxiv IDs, one-line roadmap to §6, explicit TODO outline for §2-§6; rotation away from topic pages back to a sample stub.

Deepened formal_limits topic: added long-view chronology (Furst-Saxe-Sipser 1984 → Hahn 1906.06755 → Merrill-Sabharwal 2106.16213/2207.00729/2310.07923 → Chiang-Cholak 2202.12172 → Liu 2210.10749 → Feng 2305.15408 → Sanford-Hsu-Telgarsky 2306.02896, 8 verified arxiv IDs), C-FORM-1/2/3 mech candidates with falsification conditions, 3 counter-examples (Chiang-Cholak/Brösamle-Eckstein/shortcuts), cross-links to reasoning/scaling_limits/world_model/N2.

Continued N2 sample chapter section 2 (Hahn 2019 deep-dive, ~900 substantive chars): two-theorem split (hard/soft attention), Lipschitz argument for PARITY, sociological reasons it was ignored in 2019, counter-argument that PARITY is a minimal aggregator (Dziri 2305.18654 as empirical analogue), judgment that Hahn's wall blocks parameter-scaling but not token-scaling, setting up section 4 Merrill-Sabharwal CoT upper bound.

Started N3 sample chapter (three puzzle pieces): opening §1 thesis + §2 sociology of why Faith-and-Fate / Turpin-Lanham / Reversal-Curse were discussed separately, 8 real arxiv IDs (2305.18654, 2305.04388, 2309.12288, 2303.12712, 2310.17567, 2304.15004, 2307.13702, 2202.05262, 2210.07229, 2309.14402, 2404.05405), explicit §3-§6 roadmap; rotates away from N2/topics.

Continued N2 sample chapter §3 (Merrill-Sabharwal trilogy, ~900 substantive 字): three-paper progression 2106.16213 saturated → 2207.00729 log-precision parallelism-tradeoff → 2310.07923 CoT upper bound, summary table of (assumption → complexity class), counter-evidence from Sanford-Hsu-Telgarsky 2306.02896 sparse-averaging strength + uniform/non-uniform caveat, judgment that the trilogy's value is turning the wall into an engineering question with explicit n-range and CoT-growth conditions; rotates away from N3.

Continued N3 sample chapter §3 (Faith-and-Fate deep-dive, ~900 substantive 字): Dziri's depth曲线 (acc vs reasoning depth, GPT-4 4-digit mult 4%), CoT 把曲线右推 1-2 depth 但不改形状, Feng 2305.15408 形式化对应, Allen-Zhu 2404.05405 同构解释, 反例 PRM (2305.20050) 与 long-CoT RL (DeepSeek-R1 2501.12948) 用 token 买深度但经济上限仍在, judgment that Faith-and-Fate 真贡献是把 reasoning 退化变成可测连续量并与 §4/§5 同框.

Started N4 sample chapter (Pearl ladder & LLM ceiling): §1 Pearl 2018 三层楼建构 + LeCun 互动史 + 观测等价数学事实, §2 Kıcıman 2305.00050 vs Zečević 2308.13067 因果鹦鹉之争 (~1700 substantive 字 across two sections), 3 real arxiv IDs (1801.04016, 2305.00050, 2308.13067), 三段判断 (Layer1 收敛 / Layer2 数据问题 / Layer3 悲观侧) 作为后续章节骨架, §3-§7 explicit TODO outline; rotates away from N2/N3.

Continued N2 sample chapter §4 (CoT 翻墙的账单, ~900 substantive 字): Feng 2305.15408 构造性下界与 Merrill-Sabharwal 2310.07923 上界互为表里, 三笔费用 (token 数 Ω(n²) 工程不可达 / 位置编码精度 RoPE 外推衰减 / 忠实性 Turpin 2305.04388 Lanham 2307.13702 显示 CoT 大量是事后合理化), 定理-工程对照表, judgment that o1/R1/Claude-Extended-Thinking 都是在这张账单上做局部优化; rotates away from N4.

Continued N3 sample chapter section 4 (Turpin and Lanham unfaithful CoT, ~900 substantive chars): Turpin 2305.04388 BBH (A)-bias 36pt shift with CoT not mentioning bias, Lanham 2307.13702 three perturbation tests and U-shaped faithfulness curve, non-contradiction with Dziri (depth 4-5 real compute vs depth<=3 post-hoc rationalization), Chen 2503.08679 reruns on o1/R1/Claude-Thinking still <50% faithful, Anthropic 2025-03 Biology-of-LLM attribution graph directly observes answer-first circuit, counter-evidence Grosse 2308.03296 influence functions + PRM 2305.20050 showing partial faithfulness, judgment: NTP loss applies no gradient pressure to couple internal computation with external explanation; rotates away from N2/N4.

Continued N4 sample chapter section 3 (CLadder and Jin Zhijing, ~900 substantive chars): CORR2CAUSE 2306.05836 GPT-4 ~30% zero-shot plus rename brittleness, CLadder 2312.04350 three-layer GPT-4 ~70/55/40% and CausalCoT ~80/65/50% with Layer-3 still at random baseline, counter-example naturalistic counterfactual leak-check dilemma, judgment that the past three years show essentially zero real progress on Pearl Layer-3; rotates away from N2/N3.

Started N5 sample chapter (Embodiment/VLA bet): §1 Moravec paradox + LeCun JEPA position + the explicit paradigm wager, 2 real arxiv IDs (2301.08243 I-JEPA, 2404.08471 V-JEPA, plus contextual mentions of 2212.06817/2307.15818/2406.09246/2405.12213 in TODO), explicit §2-§6 outline, frames the chapter as a falsifiable bet between LeCun and the VLA camp; rotates away from N2/N3/N4.

Deepened grounding topic: added '反例与近期突破 (2023–2026)' three-line evidence section (text-only perceptual structure Abdou 2109.06129 / Li 2106.00737 / Søgaard 2305.02223; multimodal ceiling MMVP 2401.06209 / VLM-Blind 2407.06581; VLA closed-loop OXE 2310.08864 / RT-2 2307.15818 / OpenVLA 2406.09246 / pi0 2410.24164), 2026-05-27 judgment on double-sided narrowing of falsifiable setting, two new mech candidates C-GROUND-3 (deictic asymmetry, references Ego4D 2110.07058 / RoboVQA 2311.00899) and C-GROUND-4 (contrastive != referential, references GLIP 2112.03857 / BLINK 2404.12390); rotates away from N2/N3/N4/N5 sample chapters.

Deepened world_model topic: added 'Video-NTP 这条暗线 (2024-2026)' timeline section with 8 anchored entries (GAIA-1 2309.17080 / Sora tech report / Genie 2402.15391 / LWM 2402.08268 / V-JEPA 2404.08471 / DIAMOND 2405.12399 / Cosmos [unverified] / VLA延伸 2406.09246 2410.24164 2307.15818), aligned to the three world-model definitions, judgment that video-NTP raised the stakes but still does not yield object-level long-horizon or counterfactual structure, proposes Othello-GPT-style probe on Genie 2 latent as next falsifiable test; rotates away from N2/N3/N4/N5 and grounding topic.

Continued N5 sample chapter §2 (RT-1 → RT-2 → OpenVLA, ~2200 substantive 字): Brohan-Levine-Finn 三步赌注序列 with 4 verified arxiv IDs (2212.06817 / 2307.15818 / 2406.09246 / 2310.08864 + Octo 2405.12213 / Schaeffer 2304.15004 as counter-reference), 桌面短程 vs 长程操作的反论, emergent capability 统计弱点 Schaeffer mirage 适用, 2026-05 judgment that 强命题 'action 完全无法 tokenize' 已被证伪但弱命题 '样本效率指数恶化' 未被证伪——为 §3 Pi0 数据墙铺垫; rotates away from world_model/grounding topics.

Deepened causality topic with standard 3-section block (关键证据线 chronological / 当前最强 mech 候选 / 反例与上界突破 / 2026-05-27 判断), 9-entry timeline with verified arxiv IDs (Pearl 1801.04016, Kıcıman 2305.00050, Lampinen 2305.16183, Zečević 2308.13067, CLadder 2312.04350, CORR2CAUSE 2306.05836 [unverified ID], Krishnamurthy 2403.15371, DeepSeek-R1 2501.12948, Anti-Collapse 2605.05438), expanded C-CAUSAL-1 + new C-CAUSAL-2 (Layer-3 阶梯 + #P-hard 锚点) + C-CAUSAL-3 (discovery≠inference 解耦), 三条 falsification 条件, judgment that 强命题已死 + 弱命题幸存 + agentic post-training 正在侵蚀 leak-check 护城河; rotates away from N2/N3/N4/N5/world_model/grounding.

Deepened embodiment topic: added 'Key evidence line (chronological)' 9-entry timeline (Brooks 1986-91 subsumption, DAgger 1011.0686, Levine 1603.02199, RT-1 2212.06817, RT-2 2307.15818 + Schaeffer 2304.15004 counter, OXE 2310.08864, OpenVLA 2406.09246, Diffusion Policy 2303.04137 + pi0 2410.24164, 2025 humanoid bets) and 2026-05-27 judgment: strong claim (action 不可 tokenize) 已被 RT-2/OpenVLA 部分证伪, weak claim (long-horizon contact-rich >> token seq) 被 pi0/diffusion policy 工程退却侧面背书; introduced new C-EMBOD-3 (continuous action lower bound) with RoboMimic falsification criterion; (N,D,C,morphology,horizon,contact-mode) 六轴 scaling-manifold judgement aligned with scaling_limits §流形扩张; rotates away from causality/N5/world_model/grounding.

Continued N3 sample chapter §5 (Reversal Curse, ~2400 substantive 字): Berglund 2309.12288 synthetic fictional-fact setup (Daphne Barrington/A Journey Through Time, Tom Cruise/Mary Lee Pfeiffer), Allen-Zhu Physics-of-LM Part 3.2 2404.05405 synthetic confirmation + reverse-order pretraining trick, Anthropic Scaling Monosemonicity mechanistic feature evidence, three mitigations (RAG / bidirectional pretraining UL2 2205.05131 + 2402.10171 / instruction-tuning) all conceding NTP loss never sees the reverse direction, judgment that Reversal Curse is the cleanest of the three pieces because capacity/data-distribution/architecture defenses are all eliminated by the synthetic design leaving only loss directionality; rotates away from topic pages (embodiment/causality/world_model/grounding) and N5.

Deepened formal_limits with new '经验验证线 — TC0 wall 的实测史' section: 8-entry chronology (Bhattamishra 2009.11264, Deletang 2207.02098, Anil 2207.04901, Ruoss 2305.16843, Zhou RASP-L 2310.16028, McLeish Abacus 2405.17399, Sanford k-hop 2402.09268 [unverified], Lost-in-Tokenization 2605.22471) bridging theory blood-line (1984-2023) and 2026-05 实测 evidence; judgment that TC0 wall holds only in (vanilla PE, no CoT, fixed depth) corner and has been pierced ≥4 times along each surrounding knob, so mech falsification must be local-conjoint not global; rotates away from N3/N5/embodiment/causality/world_model/grounding.

Started N6 sample chapter (World model = video generation? Three teams three answers): §1 frames the 2024-02 week when Sora (Brooks/Peebles tech report) / Genie (2402.15391 Bruce/Rocktäschel) / V-JEPA (2404.08471 Bardes/LeCun) put out three contradictory world-model bets within 8 days, table of three positions, counter-evidence noting all three remain stuck at L1 joint-distribution variants, judgment 'everyone wins part loses part — nobody has produced Pearl L2/L3 world model from video yet'; explicit §2-§6 outline with TODO markers; rotates away from N3 (last tick) and topic pages.

Deepened online_learning topic: added '时间天花板的工业测量 (2021–2026)' 6-entry chronology (Lazaridou Mind-the-Gap 2102.01951, Chen TimeQA 2108.06314, Kasai RealTime QA 2207.13332, Dhingra TempLAMA, Vu FreshLLMs 2310.03214, Cheng Dated-Data 2403.12958 [unverified], 2024-25 temporal hallucination audits); judgment that C-CONT-1 holds and now extends pre-cutoff by 6-12mo (Δ before nominal cutoff already sparse); introduced new C-CONT-3 (tail-end pretraining sparsity) with falsification + explicit distinction from scaling_limits C-SCALE-3 plasticity cliff; strengthened C-CONT-1 with current-state line citing FreshQA/RealTimeQA 3-year non-falsification. Rotates away from N6/N3 samples and recent topic pages.

Continued N4 sample chapter §4 'Lampinen 的旁观者实验：第二层能不能蹭到' (~5.2k chars): Andrew Lampinen 2305.16183 passive-learning-of-active-causal-strategies setup with light+switch+confounder envs, two-sided result (intervention-marker present → 70-80% Layer-2 / marker removed → random), Richens-Everitt 2402.10877 robust-agents-learn-causal-world-models theoretical anchor with its 'all distribution shifts' caveat, judgment that Pearl 第二层 is a '语料墙' not absolute wall + agentic post-training implication bridging to §6; honest counter on synthetic-vs-naturalistic environment two-bind and leak-check impossibility for RCT papers in frontier training sets; updated samples/README §1–§3 → §1–§4; rotates away from online_learning topic and N6/N3.

Continued N2 sample chapter §5 'Faith and Fate：把账单画成 GPT-4 的实验曲线' (~3.0k chars): Dziri 2305.18654 NeurIPS 2023 spotlight three-task setup (multi-digit mult / Einstein puzzles / DP), fine-tune on d cannot extrapolate to d+1 (compositional gap), bridges Hahn-Merrill three-trilogy theoretical line to GPT-4 empirical curve, three honest caveats (task selection bias / CoT protocol limited to scratchpad pre-o1 / GPT-4 blackbox confounds), Singh-Strouse 2402.14903 tokenization counts as separable variable (10–30 pp independent effect), forward link to Allen-Zhu Physics-of-LM Part 3.3 2407.20311 [unverified part编号] as the bridging controlled-synthetic experiment; rotates away from N3/N4/N5/N6 samples and all recently-touched topic pages.

Task C: refined taxonomy.md from 33-line stub into a grading framework (~+5.2k chars): (1) 4-prong NTP-cap to NTP-mech upgrade criteria (lemma-style formal statement / non-trivial map to known complexity-info-algebra object / protocol-level falsification in <=1k GPU-h / explicit排除 five engineering confounds); (2) 3-trigger downgrade rule (A confound dissolved, B knob opened, C implicit-default exposed); (3) rolling升降级 log with 8 historical events cross-citing Garcia 2605.10799, Anti-Collapse 2605.05438, Conditional-Attribute 2605.14004, Causal Tongue-Tie 2605.25891, ProFIL 2605.11467, Ruoss 2305.16843 / McLeish 2405.17399 PE openings, plus C1/C4 conditional NTP-mech 升格; (4) current candidate snapshot table (C1 Det-Horizon / C2 hallucination-SNR / C3 Omega(H) / C4 VLA budget / Reversal Curse) cross-linked to topic pages with per-row falsification; (5) explicit '改三处同步' rule (topic + ntp_survey.md sec10 + this page). Judgment: 升级事件稀疏 (3y 只 C1/C4 真正达成 conditional NTP-mech)，降级密集 -> 默认假设新候选会被下一 confound 降级。Rotates away from all 6 recent samples and all 8 topic pages.

Continued N5 sample chapter §3 'Pi0 与 Physical Intelligence：把数据墙画在 PPT 上的那一年' (~3.2k chars): Levine/Finn/Hausman 2024-03 founding of PI as capital-doubled VLA bet; π0 2410.24164 三项范式增量 (PaliGemma+flow-matching action expert, 10k hours mixed-morphology, 5-10min long-horizon contact-rich demos); 数据墙量化 with DROID 2403.12945 anchor and Finn RSS 2024-12 'thousandth of internet' quote [uncertain]; π0.5 异质数据妥协意味着 VLA 阵营自己承认 robot-only D 不够; Octo 2405.12213 zero-shot <30% / fine-tune 60-80% star-marked cross-embodiment; judgment: 强命题 §2 已被证伪 / 弱命题 §3 被 PI 路线图自我证实 / 2027-28 π0 部署曲线决定 NTP 是否吞下身体; rotates away from N2/N4/N6 samples and all recent topic pages (taxonomy/online_learning/formal_limits).

Continued N3 sample chapter §6 '三合一：把三块碎片拼回 NTP loss 的几何' (~4.2k chars): formalized NTP loss into three orthogonal structural properties (逐 token 局部性 / 过程-结果同构惩罚 / 方向单向性) each mapping cleanly to one of the three puzzle pieces (Dziri depth curve / Turpin-Lanham unfaithful CoT / Berglund Reversal Curse); explicit anti-conflation move ('three orthogonal cross-sections of the same loss, NOT three faces of one root cause' — corrects what would have been narrative laziness); mitigation parity table (long-CoT RL+PRM / process supervision / reverse-order+UL2 2205.05131+RAG) with per-row real cost; Sutton counter-argument explicitly stated and accepted-in-half ('physical wall is wrong, economic wall remains'); three-layered final judgment with falsifiable 5-year bet (2027 对账); cites Feng 2305.15408, Allen-Zhu 2404.05405, Anthropic Biology-of-LLM 2025-03, Yanda Chen 2503.08679, o1/R1 2501.12948, Scaling Monosemanticity; bridges forward to N4 (Pearl ladder layer-2/3). Updated samples/README §1–§5 → §1–§6. Rotates away from N5/N2/N6/N4 samples and all recent topic pages.

Continued N6 sample chapter §2 'Sora 之后两年：从 world simulator 退到 video model 的措辞史' (~3.6k chars): traces OpenAI's official wording downgrade (2024-02 tech report 'world simulator' → 2025-02 system card footnote → 2025-09 Sora 2 release note 'improved physical realism' + mission statement edit [uncertain commit ts]); cites Kang-You 2411.02385 flat OOD-vs-scale curve as cleanest refutation of pixel-NTP scale-believer claim; PhyGenBench/VideoPhy 2406.03520 30–40% physical plausibility vs 80% visual realism scissor gap; WorldModelBench 2410.14572 [unverified ID] dimension split where Sora loses physical-law/3D-consistency to Genie/latent lines; explicit image-gen (DALL-E 3 → GPT-4o native image) counter-example showing the wall is *time* not pixels; closes with falsifiable 2026-27 PhyGenBench 60% threshold bet + meta-judgment that paradigm hypotheses usually die by silent replacement (Sora 3 absorbing latent state + action conditioning) rather than open refutation; bridges forward to §3 Genie's action-first loss geometry. Cleaned up duplicated §3 TODO line. Updated samples/README N6 status §1 → §1–§2. Rotates away from N2/N3/N4/N5 samples and all recent topic pages (taxonomy/online_learning/formal_limits).

Opened N7 sample chapter §1–§2 'Continual learning：为什么 LLM 不会持续学习' (~7.1k chars; first creation of the file). §1 walks the 2021–2024 measurement chain that turned 'LM goes stale' from anecdote into a curve: Lazaridou 2102.01951 monthly-bucketed perplexity decay (separating language ability from referential ability), Chen 2108.06314 TimeQA exposing missing internal time-index even for in-corpus facts, Dhingra TempLAMA TACL 2022 corroborating, Kasai 2207.13332 RealTime QA three-year retrieval-gap quantification (closed-book accuracy ~0 on last-week news), Vu 2310.03214 FreshQA jointly measuring cutoff×staleness×hallucination (false-premise 30–50% confident fabrication as a first-order NTP artifact: cross-entropy forbids 'I don't know' from being high-prob), Cheng 2403.12958 [unverified ID] effective-vs-nominal-cutoff probe showing pretraining tail-end writes are sparse — strengthening C-CONT-1 from 'fails after cutoff' to 'fails 6–12 months before cutoff' (a structural, not deployment, problem). §2 explains meta-distinction between topic catalog vs sample judgment-stack and lays out TODO §3–§6 roadmap (NTP-loss fixed point + EWC 1612.00796 degenerating to replay / Ibrahim 2403.08763 anatomy / three live counter-examples TTT-Linear 2407.04620 + MEMIT 2210.07229 + Letta-Mem0-Zep / 2027 falsifiable bet). README N7 row flipped from 待写 to 推进中 §1–§2. Rotates away from N2/N3/N4/N5/N6 samples (all touched in last 5 ticks) and all 8 topic pages (all touched in last 24h).

Task B: deepened topics/reasoning.md with new section 'Reversal Curse 修复尝试线 (2023–2026)' (~2.7k chars) carving out C-REAS-1's repair history as its own evidence line. Five datapoints: (1) Berglund 2309.12288 appendix D bidirectional FT partial fix; (2) Golovneva 2403.13799 Meta reverse-training as first objective-level improvement (reverse acc 0→80% on Berglund task at 1.4B but non-zero MMLU/HellaSwag perplexity cost); (3) Allen-Zhu Physics-of-LM 3.2 2309.14402 knowledge-augmentation rewrites C-REAS-1 boundary from 'NTP cannot learn B→A' to weaker 'NTP cannot learn B→A from single-context exposure'; (4) engineering workaround (RAG + canonical id + symmetric edges in Letta/Mem0) framed as state-externalization that REINFORCES rather than refutes mech claim; (5) open evidence gap — no ≥7B prefix-LM / UL2 2205.05131 clean replication exists, R1/o1 reasoning cannot disambiguate 'learned reverse' from 'inference-time enumeration'. Closes: falsifiable setting narrowed from 'any NTP / any scale' to 'standard L-to-R NTP + single-context + ≥7B' but remains unfalsified — why C-REAS-1 is still mech-candidate #1. Names two unattempted decisive experiments: ≥7B pure prefix-LM Berglund replication (would downgrade to NTP-cap) and Anthropic-style attribution-graph localization of forward/reverse circuit asymmetry. Rotation: all samples (N2–N7) touched in last 5 ticks so leaving samples; reasoning.md not in last 5 deepen-tick file set. Picked over scaling_limits/grounding/world_model because open-problem #5 (≥7B prefix-LM Reversal Curse replication) was most clearly underdocumented thread.

Task B: deepened topics/scaling_limits.md with new section 'Inference-time scaling: 第四轴 (2024–2026)' (~5.3k chars) — adding the missing C_inference axis to the previously (N,D,C_train,precision,horizon,topic-freq)-only treatment. Six chronological datapoints: Brown 2407.21787 Large Language Monkeys (coverage power-law in repeated sampling, 10^4x inference compute pulls Llama-3-8B to ~GPT-4o on verifier-rich tasks); Snell 2408.03314 (compute-optimal test-time vs pretrain compute, ~14x inference can substitute ~14x pretrain on easy-to-medium MATH); OpenAI o1 (2024-09 system card — first product where test-time compute is publicly a second scaling curve); DeepSeek-R1 2501.12948 (length-vs-accuracy log-linear; R1-Distill-Qwen-7B beats GPT-4o on math via inference); Wu 2408.00724 inference-scaling-laws (power-law exponent varies with task verifiability — drops to ~0 on open-ended tasks, scoping the law to verifier-rich subset); Sardana 2401.00448 Beyond-Chinchilla (when inference cost dominates, optimal N/D shifts toward smaller N + more D — second systematic correction to Chinchilla); Muennighoff s1 2501.19393 [unverified ID] (1k SFT + budget-forcing matches o1-preview on AIME-24 — weakens claim that R1-style RL is necessary for inference-scaling). Introduces new candidate C-SCALE-4 (inference-train compute equivalence within verifier-rich tasks) with falsification criterion and explicit reconciliation with C-SCALE-1 Omega(H) — cost not eliminated, just amortized from training samples to per-query inference compute. Notes inference-scaling's edge collapses on non-verifier tasks (dual of C-WM-2 open-world dilution). Rotation: scaling_limits.md was the ONLY topic page not touched in last 20 deepen ticks, and was the smallest topic file (~11k chars before this tick). All N2–N7 sample chapters touched in last 5 ticks — avoided.

Continued N7 sample §3 'Catastrophic forgetting：把它写成 NTP loss 的一个不动点' (~3.4k substantive chars): McCloskey-Cohen 1989 origin → Kirkpatrick EWC 1612.00796 with three explicit reasons EWC fails at LLM scale (Fisher storage 280GB at 70B / Fisher degenerate on NTP high-freq tokens / Pouransari Apple 2024 [unverified] LR-decay incompatibility); formal write-up of forgetting as gradient direction along D_pretrain high-entropy axes; Lyle 2303.01486 plasticity-loss dual view with Atari 10M-step 1/5 sample-efficiency curve; Dohare Nature 2024 continual-backprop ImageNet-2000-task clean refutation of standard SGD, plus honest caveat that the setting is vision not LM-scale streaming; Lyle 2024 follow-up [unverified] showing plasticity-recovery breaks induction-head superposition (Elhage 2022); judgment that catastrophic forgetting is a joint fixed point of (NTP loss + dense transformer + cross-entropy) — any in-paradigm fix degenerates to replay (batched-offline) or external memory (admitting weights stop learning, bridges to §5).
